title: Research: Pest parser plus staged semantic rule pipeline
body:
## What was done

Validated **PecanParser** (Pest) feeding a **staged semantic rule pipeline**: rules run in explicit phases with documented ordering and diagnostic integration status.

## Why it mattered

Confirmed that parse output could flow into HIR-backed rules without a second ad-hoc AST—direct precursor to Beskid’s typed-HIR spine and `beskid_pipeline` phase IDs.

## Research conclusion

Staged rules + span-backed diagnostics are viable; later bands replaced Pecan-specific naming but kept the phase model.

source.subject: Update semantic analysis docs with current diagnostic codes, rule integration status, and type system progress
